text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation as I step into this modern, thoughtful space. The clear glass, vibrant patterns, and the focus on 'R+D'—research and development—signal an environment dedicated to innovation, reflection, and learning. I am drawn in by the blend of technology and creativity, eager to explore how humanity connects and coexists with intelligence—both artificial and human. The atmosphere hints at discovery, and I feel inspired, ready for insight and new questions.
